description: Brain AI command catalogue for Kaelus.online

commands.description: Scan text or a document for CUI, PII, and compliance violations

commands.description: Generate a PDF compliance report with SPRS score and gap analysis

commands.description: Identify and prioritize compliance gaps mapped to CMMC domains

commands.description: Calculate your SPRS (Supplier Performance Risk System) score

commands.description: Review quarantined AI requests flagged by the compliance firewall

commands.name: timeline
commands.description: View your CMMC compliance readiness timeline

commands.name: pricing
commands.description: View Kaelus subscription plans and upgrade options

commands.name: help
commands.description: Get help and documentation for Brain AI capabilities

commands.name: demo
commands.description: Run the Kaelus compliance firewall demo

commands.name: settings

commands.name: team

commands.name: tasks
